ADMISSIONS OPEN 2026–27

Welcome to Admissions

ABC College invites applications for the academic year 2026–27. Join our world-class programs with industry-leading faculty, state-of-the-art labs, and a 100% placement track record. Applications are accepted online. Deadline: 31st July 2026.

Online Admission Form

Courses Offered

  • B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering
  • B.Tech Cyber Security
  • Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
  • Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
  • Master of Business Administration (MBA)
